daily.today_energy: The cosmic vibe is all about authenticity today, Aquarius. Your quirky energy is magnetic—lean into what makes you different. People are drawn to your genuine wavelength, so trust your instincts and let your freak flag fly.
daily.love: If you're coupled up, meaningful conversations are on the menu. Single? Someone might slide into your orbit who appreciates your unconventional perspective. Either way, vulnerability looks good on you today.
daily.career: Your innovative ideas are hitting different right now. Don't dim your vision to fit the room—your unique approach is exactly what's needed. Trust the momentum and pitch that bold concept you've been sitting on.
daily.health: Your energy feels scattered but not in a bad way. Channel that restless feeling into movement—dance, walk, shake it out. Your nervous system will thank you for the physical outlet. Hydration is your bestie today.

weekly.overview: Mercury's doing its thing this week, bringing clarity to situations that felt foggy. You're entering a phase where your intuition is basically your superpower. Trust the weird hunches—they're actually onto something real.
weekly.love: If you're coupled up, this is a week for deeper conversations that actually hit different. Single? Someone might slide into your orbit who gets your vibe. Either way, authenticity is your love language rn.
weekly.career: Your creative energy is peaked this week. Ideas you've been sitting on are ready to breathe. Collaboration feels natural, so don't sleep on teamwork. The universe is basically saying your work matters.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for intentional rest, not forced productivity. Moving in ways that feel good (not what the algorithm says) will shift your whole energy. Hydration and sleep are underrated manifestation tools.
